key.name: panel-height
key.summary: Taskbar height

key.name: panel-position
key.summary: Taskbar screen edge

key.name: panel-autohide-enabled
key.summary: Hide the panel until the pointer reaches its screen edge

key.name: icon-size
key.summary: Application icon size

key.name: icon-spacing
key.summary: Space between application buttons

key.name: transparency-enabled
key.summary: Enable taskbar transparency

key.name: transparency-level
key.summary: Taskbar background transparency percentage

key.name: panel-theme-follow-system
key.summary: Follow the active GNOME Shell theme

key.name: panel-theme
key.summary: Taskbar colour scheme when not following the system

key.name: workspace-scroll-enabled
key.summary: Switch workspaces by scrolling over empty taskbar space

key.name: workspace-scroll-delay
key.summary: Minimum delay between scroll workspace changes in milliseconds

key.name: panel-menu-click-only
key.summary: Require a click to switch between panel menus

key.name: taskbar-locked
key.summary: Prevent application icons from being rearranged by dragging

key.name: notification-banner-bottom-end
key.summary: Align notification banners with the taskbar edge and clock

key.name: task-manager-app
key.summary: Application opened by the taskbar Task Manager action

key.name: activities-button-visible
key.summary: Show the Activities button on the taskbar

key.name: folder-menu-enabled
key.summary: Show a selected folder menu on the taskbar

key.name: folder-menu-uri
key.summary: Folder displayed by the taskbar folder menu

key.name: multi-monitor-panels
key.summary: Show taskbar panels on every connected monitor

key.name: default-gnome-panel
key.summary: Use a GNOME-style panel without taskbar applications

key.name: hide-pinned-taskbar-apps
key.summary: Hide pinned taskbar applications while they are not running

key.name: isolate-workspaces
key.summary: Show running applications from the active workspace only

key.name: multi-window-click-spread
key.summary: Show an application window spread when its taskbar icon is clicked

key.name: app-alignment
key.summary: Application button alignment

key.name: start-button-position
key.summary: Start button position

key.name: start-button-padding
key.summary: Horizontal padding around the Start button icon

key.name: start-button-custom-icon
key.summary: URI or path of a custom Start button icon

key.name: gnome-start-button-visible
key.summary: Show the original GNOME Applications button

key.name: windows-start-menu-enabled
key.summary: Replace the GNOME applications view with an Eleven-style Start Menu

key.name: start-menu-theme
key.summary: Eleven-style Start Menu colour theme

key.name: start-menu-follow-panel-theme
key.summary: Use the panel's effective light or dark theme for the Eleven-style Start Menu

key.name: start-menu-monitor-centered
key.summary: Center the Eleven-style Start Menu on the monitor

key.name: start-menu-super-tab
key.summary: Open the Eleven-style Start Menu with Super+Tab

key.name: start-menu-super-tab-hotkey
key.summary: Internal Super+Tab shortcut for the Eleven-style Start Menu

key.name: start-menu-displaced-switch-applications
key.summary: Internal recovery state for the displaced GNOME shortcut

key.name: start-menu-custom-hotkey
key.summary: Custom shortcut for the Eleven-style Start Menu

key.name: start-menu-pinned-apps
key.summary: Applications pinned to the Eleven-style Start Menu

key.name: target-prefs-page
key.summary: Preferences page to display when opening settings

key.name: clock-position
key.summary: Clock position

key.name: system-menu-position
key.summary: Quick Settings position
